sections.content:
Good progress! The square moved from (38, 32) to (47, 29), and magenta moved from (40, 33) to (49, 30). G is still at (57, 27).
The square is now at (47, 29) and G is at (57, 27). That's about 10 rows down and 2 columns left.

Let me try another batch of maybe 8-10 magenta clicks.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Continue advancing square toward G
predict(expect_change=True, note='Batch 8 magenta clicks')
actions = [{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 49, 'col': 30}] * 8
action(actions)
print(f"Result: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}, done={last_action_result.get('done')}, game_over={last_action_result.get('game_over')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== After batch ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('M', 'W', 'G', 'g', 'p') and n['pixels'] < 50:
        r, c = n['boundary'][0]
        print(f"{n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, at ({r}, {c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
